title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 334.073 - Continuing medical education on autism required
text:
334.073.  Continuing medical education on autism required. — Pursuant to the requirements of 4 CSR 150- 2.125*, the state board of registration for the healing arts shall accept toward the fifty-hour license renewal requirement, continuing medical education courses which have an emphasis on the early diagnosis and treatment of autism in children.
(L. 2002 S.B. 1207) 
*Revisor's Note:  4 CSR 150-2.125 was moved to 20 CSR 2150-2.125 effective August 28, 2006.
